context: The response should exercise the `harness-init` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: discovers_project_commands
checklist.description: Discovers project setup, dependency, test, lint, and local check commands from repo evidence.

checklist.name: sets_dispatcher_loop
checklist.description: Sets up the harness dispatcher/polling loop and config files needed for agent execution.

checklist.name: creates_agents_contract
checklist.description: Creates or updates AGENTS.md-style guidance as a map to durable context.

checklist.name: provisions_worktrees
checklist.description: Accounts for worktree provisioning/bootstrap so feature worktrees are runnable.

checklist.name: asks_when_unknown
checklist.description: Asks or flags uncertainty instead of inventing setup commands when discovery is thin.
